## Checklist

- [ ] Template ID uses the `contrib.` namespace
- [ ] File is under `catalog/community/`
- [ ] `python3 tools/lint_templates.py catalog/community/ --community-pr` passes
- [ ] `python3 tools/build_index.py` was run and `catalog/index.json` is committed
- [ ] `author` field is set to my GitHub handle
- [ ] Decoding has been verified against real hardware <!-- or note below that it has NOT -->
